personal.name: Chandrakant Shah
personal.title: Electrical & Electronics Engineering Student
personal.tagline: Robotics & Power Electronics Enthusiast. Passionate about building real-world electronics systems that bring genuine warmth and efficiency to everyday life.

project.name: LM317 Voltage Regulator
project.desc: An adjustable DC regulated power supply designed from the ground up for maximum reliability. Built to ensure that delicate lab equipment receives perfectly stable voltage under varying loads.
project.testimonial: Chandrakant's power supply setup brought incredible peace of mind to our lab sessions. Knowing the voltage was rock-solid allowed us to focus on our experiments.
project.author: Lab Partner & Peer Engineer

project.name: APS System
project.desc: An automatic mains-inverter switching system that guarantees zero downtime. I engineered this to seamlessly bridge power gaps, keeping homes running smoothly when the grid drops.
project.testimonial: The transition between mains and inverter is so smooth you don't even notice the power went out. It's a game-changer for daily life.
project.author: Project Supervisor
